title: U.S.-Iran deal in photos: ships in the Strait of Hormuz, daily life in Tehran
summary_full: The first signs of a post-war recovery are emerging across the Middle East after the United States and Iran signed a memorandum aimed at ending the conflict.
summary_public: The first signs of a post-war recovery are emerging across the Middle East after the United States and Iran signed a memorandum aimed at ending the conflict.
